visual_description: A nighttime highway scene shows multiple cars with headlights on, followed by a close-up of a driver in a white shirt inside a black SUV. The view shifts to a black BMW with bright headlights and license plate HN 397 driving toward the camera past a yellow illuminated bollard. The car proceeds forward on the road under streetlights.
audio_description: Engine and traffic noises are audible, with no distinct speech or music.
